arguments.argument:
playSound(global.snd_HeartPiece,0,1,1) showEmote(oIdentifier,0,-6,sEmHappy)
msgCreate(0,0,"","You found the [Item Finder]. With this, Chao can now alert you to hidden items. When entering a map, Chao will display a treasure icon above her if an item is in that map.",6,3,oMessagePerson,0) newMessage.fadingTime=360 awardAwesome(100000)
global.itemFinder=1 instance_destroy()
